title: Chapter 1: Introduction to System Administration
description: Introduction to system administration concepts, roles of a system administrator, and basic server types including web servers and file servers.

title: Chapter 2: Computer Hardware Servicing
description: Fundamentals of computer hardware, components, troubleshooting techniques, and proper servicing and maintenance of computer systems.

title: Chapter 3: Installation and Management
description: Procedures for installing operating systems and software, along with managing system configurations, users, and basic administrative tasks.
